privileged_info_summary: The task involves post-visit documentation for a synthetic patient, Chloe Rafferty (pid 31, DOB 2001-04-18, female), created for testing purposes in a NOSH ChartingSystem environment. All documented clinical values are realistic: ICD-10 code J06.9 for acute upper respiratory infection is medically accurate, azithromycin 500mg is a standard FDA-approved antibiotic dosage, vital signs (weight 134 lbs, height 65 inches, BP 112/72, pulse 74, temperature 99.1°F) fall within normal ranges, and a penicillin allergy is a common documented contraindication. The follow-up appointment is scheduled for 2026-07-08 at 10:00 AM. The pass threshold of 70 points requires successful completion of at least 5 of 6 documentation subtasks. All metadata values are internally consistent across task files.
